title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Sri Chaitanya Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Sri Chaitanya Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sri Chaitanya Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Sri Chaitanya Capital India:
Sri Chaitanya Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya Capital India!
